required_elements.element: Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence
Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to a qualifying order of protection
Does the report include all needed information
Did the officer assist the victim
How was the case received
Was information provided about obtaining an order of protection
Is the time of the call recorded (including time of incident, time of dispatch, time of arrival)
Was information provided to the victim about local service providers
Are the elements of the crime(s) articulated to meet state and/or federal laws that address domestic violence
Was a threat/risk assessment tool used with the victim
What were the observations upon approach
Is there a valid protection order in place
Is the scene concisely described/diagramed
Were photos taken and details recorded
Is the relationship of the parties identified
What is the history of the relationship (include frequency of any violence, intimidation, and threats)
Were all witnesses interviewed and documented
Was an arrest made
Were there children on the scene
Was information about previous incidents documented
Were weapons/objects used
What was the emotional state of the victim
What was the emotional state of the suspect
What evidence was collected
Was a threat/risk assessment tool used with the suspect
Is evidence of fear articulated in the report
Have all threats been clearly documented
Was the proper protocol followed if the suspect was not on the scene
Is the use of coercion and/or force articulated
Have all injuries (visible and non-visible) been documented
Were injuries existing or new
Was there any property damage, theft, or burglary
Are stalking behaviors identified
Did the officer inquire about possible strangulation
Did the victim report being strangled
Did the victim request/need medical attention
Did the victim report sexual violence
Were all spontaneous statements captured
Did the officer ask about firearms
Did the suspect use firearms during the incident
Did the suspect make threats to use firearms
Does the suspect have access to firearms
Did the victim express fear about the suspect's access to firearms
Were firearms/weapons confiscated
